footer_note: Night Crow For Safari is a closed-source Safari Web Extension.
idx_intro: Night Crow For Safari brings a smart, customizable dark mode to every website you visit. Dynamic per-site color remapping, per-site rules, and scheduling. macOS and iOS.
idx_f_dynamic: Dynamic mode: reads each site's own colors and rebuilds them dark, so photos stay true and text stays readable. The default and best-looking option.
idx_f_filter: Filter mode: instant CSS-based inversion with re-inverted media
idx_f_filterplus: Filter+: SVG color-matrix variant for better photo fidelity
idx_f_static: Static mode: pick your own background, text, and link colors
idx_f_persite: Per-site rules: enable, disable, or tune any setting on individual sites
idx_f_scheduler: Scheduler: match your system appearance, follow a time window, or use sunrise and sunset
idx_f_native: Made for Safari: native popup, native onboarding, native feedback loop
idx_support_body: Found a bug or want a feature?
priv_intro: Night Crow For Safari is built to respect your privacy completely. It does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data or any record of your browsing.
priv_collect_body: Nothing. There is no account, no analytics, no telemetry, no tracking, and no advertising. We have no servers that your browsing touches.
priv_how_1: To apply a dark theme, the extension reads and restyles the content of the pages you choose to allow it on. All of this happens on your device, in real time. The content of the pages you visit is never sent anywhere.
priv_how_2: Your settings (theme preferences, per-site rules, schedules, custom CSS) are stored locally on your device using Safari's extension storage. They are not transmitted to us or to any third party.
priv_how_3: You can disable the extension globally, or on individual sites, at any time.
priv_share_body: None. Because no data is collected, there is nothing to sell, share, or hand to any third party.
priv_children_body: The extension collects no data from anyone, including children.
priv_changes_body: If this policy ever changes, the updated version will be posted on this page with a new date above.
terms_intro: By installing or using Night Crow For Safari (the "app"), you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.
terms_license_body: You are granted a personal, non-transferable license to use the app on devices you own or control, in accordance with the App Store Terms of Service. The app's standard Apple-licensed-application end user license agreement also applies.
terms_use_1: Use the app only for its intended purpose: applying a dark theme to websites in Safari.
terms_use_2: Do not attempt to reverse engineer, resell, or redistribute the app except as permitted by law.
terms_warranty_body: The app is provided "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind. Websites vary widely, and a retrofitted dark theme may not render every page perfectly. You use the app at your own discretion.
terms_liability_body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, CorvusDevs is not liable for any indirect or consequential damages arising from your use of the app.
terms_changes_body: These terms may be updated; the current version is always posted on this page with the date above.
